chunks.text: University of California at Berkeley Department of Electrical Engineering & Computer Sciences Instructional Support Group /share/b/pub/cygwin.help Nov 18 2015 CONTENTS Cygwin Cygwin ------ Cygwin is a GNU open source projec

ygwin ------ Cygwin is a GNU open source project that provides UNIX programs that run on Windows computers. You can obtain it from http://cygwin.com. Instructional Support Group 378/384/386 Cory, 333 Soda inst@eecs.berkeley.
